result.stdout:
GitHub Stats

Helps you to get stats from your GitHub repos

Usage: ghstat [command] [options]

Options:
  -?|-h|--help   Show help information.
  -u|--username  GitHub repo owner username, REQUIRED
  -p|--password  GitHub repo owner Personal Access Token, REQUIRED
  -r             GitHub repo name, at least 1 repo is REQUIRED
  -for           Time interval, (eg. (1d, 2w, 3m, 4y)), default 2 weeks
  -until         Endpoint of time interval provied with -for, default now

Commands:
  commit         Example: ghstat commit -u:user -p:pass -r:repo -for:1w
                 -until:20-02-2022 (--committer|--changes)
  pull           Example: ghstat pull -u:user -p:pass -r:repo -for:1w
                 -until:20-02-2022 (--puller|--reviewer|--changes)

Run 'ghstat [command] -?|-h|--help' for more information about a command.

commands.payload:
GitHub Stats

Helps you to get stats from your GitHub repos

Usage: ghstat [command] [options]

Options:
  -?|-h|--help   Show help information.
  -u|--username  GitHub repo owner username, REQUIRED
  -p|--password  GitHub repo owner Personal Access Token, REQUIRED
  -r             GitHub repo name, at least 1 repo is REQUIRED
  -for           Time interval, (eg. (1d, 2w, 3m, 4y)), default 2 weeks
  -until         Endpoint of time interval provied with -for, default now

Commands:
  commit         Example: ghstat commit -u:user -p:pass -r:repo -for:1w
                 -until:20-02-2022 (--committer|--changes)
  pull           Example: ghstat pull -u:user -p:pass -r:repo -for:1w
                 -until:20-02-2022 (--puller|--reviewer|--changes)

Run 'ghstat [command] -?|-h|--help' for more information about a command.

result.stdout:
GitHub stats get commits

Example: ghstat commit -u:user -p:pass -r:repo -for:1w -until:20-02-2022 (--committer|--changes)

Usage: ghstat commit [options]

Options:
  --help         Show help information.
  --committer    Include committers stat
  --changes      Include changes stat
  -u|--username  GitHub repo owner username, REQUIRED
  -p|--password  GitHub repo owner Personal Access Token, REQUIRED
  -r             GitHub repo name, at least 1 repo is REQUIRED
  -for           Time interval, (eg. (1d, 2w, 3m, 4y)), default 2 weeks
  -until         Endpoint of time interval provied with -for, default now

result.stdout:
GitHub stats get pulls

Example: ghstat pull -u:user -p:pass -r:repo -for:1w -until:20-02-2022 (--puller|--reviewer|--changes)

Usage: ghstat pull [options]

Options:
  --help         Show help information.
  --puller       Include pullers stat
  --reviewer     Include reviewers stat
  --changes      Include changes stat
  -u|--username  GitHub repo owner username, REQUIRED
  -p|--password  GitHub repo owner Personal Access Token, REQUIRED
  -r             GitHub repo name, at least 1 repo is REQUIRED
  -for           Time interval, (eg. (1d, 2w, 3m, 4y)), default 2 weeks
  -until         Endpoint of time interval provied with -for, default now
